languages.text: {n}Впервые за века меровский полк перешел в наступление на свой беспощадный мир. Свою победу она вырвали из пасти ксенотварей немалой кровью — но это стало первым триумфом полка.{/n}

{n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Впервые за века меровский полк перешел в наступление на свой беспощадный мир. Свою победу она вырвали из пасти ксенотварей немалой кровью — но это стало первым триумфом полка.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

{n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

{n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

languages.text: {n}32番メロウ連隊は、数世紀ぶりに、自分たちの故郷と呼ぶこの残酷な世界に攻勢に出た。異種生物の牙を食い破り、多くの血を流して勝利を掴んだ。それは連隊にとって初めての勝利だった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 32番メロウ連隊は、数世紀ぶりに、自分たちの故郷と呼ぶこの残酷な世界に攻勢に出た。異種生物の牙を食い破り、多くの血を流して勝利を掴んだ。それは連隊にとって初めての勝利だった。

languages.text: {n}Por primera vez en siglos, el 32.º regimiento de Merov llevó a cabo una ofensiva contra el cruel mundo al que llamaban hogar. Derramó mucha sangre para ello, pero consiguió arrancar la victoria de las fauces de la xenobestia: el primer triunfo del regimiento».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Por primera vez en siglos, el 32.º regimiento de Merov llevó a cabo una ofensiva contra el cruel mundo al que llamaban hogar. Derramó mucha sangre para ello, pero consiguió arrancar la victoria de las fauces de la xenobestia: el primer triunfo del regimiento».{/n}

languages.text: {n}时隔数世纪，梅罗夫第32团首次向这片他们称之为家园的残酷世界发起反击。在付出惨烈代价后，他们从异形怪物的獠牙间夺取了胜利——而这，恰是军团历史上第一场真正的凯旋。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}时隔数世纪，梅罗夫第32团首次向这片他们称之为家园的残酷世界发起反击。在付出惨烈代价后，他们从异形怪物的獠牙间夺取了胜利——而这，恰是军团历史上第一场真正的凯旋。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Erstmals seit Jahrhunderten hat das 32. Merov-Regiment die Offensive gegen die unerbittliche Welt ergriffen, auf der es ausgeharrt hatte. Es hat viel Blut vergossen, um der Xenobestie den Sieg zu entreißen ... aber es war der erste Triumph des Regiments.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Erstmals seit Jahrhunderten hat das 32. Merov-Regiment die Offensive gegen die unerbittliche Welt ergriffen, auf der es ausgeharrt hatte. Es hat viel Blut vergossen, um der Xenobestie den Sieg zu entreißen ... aber es war der erste Triumph des Regiments."

languages.text: {n}32. Merov Alayı, evim dediği acımasız dünyaya karşı yüzyıllardır ilk kez saldırıya geçti. Zaferi zenohayvanın çenesinden çok kan dökerek söküp aldılar. Bu, alayın ilk zaferi oldu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}32. Merov Alayı, evim dediği acımasız dünyaya karşı yüzyıllardır ilk kez saldırıya geçti. Zaferi zenohayvanın çenesinden çok kan dökerek söküp aldılar. Bu, alayın ilk zaferi oldu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Pour la première fois depuis des siècles, le 32e régiment de Merov prit les armes contre son impitoyable planète. Ses soldats arrachèrent la victoire de la gueule des xénobêtes au prix d'un terrible bain de sang, mais ce fut là leur premier triomphe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}For the first time in centuries, the 32nd Merov Regiment went on the offensive against the ruthless world it called home. It wrested victory from the jaws of the xenobeast with much bloodshed — but it was the regiment's first triumph.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Pour la première fois depuis des siècles, le 32e régiment de Merov prit les armes contre son impitoyable planète. Ses soldats arrachèrent la victoire de la gueule des xénobêtes au prix d'un terrible bain de sang, mais ce fut là leur premier triomphe.{/n}
